title: Ethiopian Inspired Purple Noodles Tagine
description: A unique fusion of Ethiopian and Paleo flavors, featuring vibrant purple shirataki noodles in a rich, smoky sauce.

ingredients.name: Tallow
ingredients.notes: Rendered beef fat for smoky flavor

ingredients.name: Turmeric
ingredients.notes: For vibrant color and earthy flavor

instructions: Heat tallow in a large, deep skillet or clay vessel over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Grate ginger and add to skillet, cooking an additional 2 minutes.
Mince garlic and add to skillet, cooking 1 minute more.
Add Berbere Spice, turmeric, and salt to skillet, stirring to combine.
Add shirataki noodles to skillet, stirring to coat with spice mixture.
Pour in coconut cream, stirring to combine with noodles and spice mixture.
Simmer tagine over low heat for 10-15 minutes, or until noodles have absorbed most of the sauce.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
